upcoming: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standards for AI Act (expected 2026)

obligations.source_quote: Where providers of high-risk AI systems or general-purpose AI models do not comply with the common specifications referred to in paragraph 1, they shall duly justify that they have adopted technical solutions that meet the requirements referred to in Section 2 of this Chapter or, as applicable, comply with the obligations set out in Sections 2 and 3 of Chapter V to a level at least equivalent thereto.
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system or general-purpose AI model that does not follow common specifications

decomposed_atoms.description: Provider must justify equivalent technical solutions when not following common specifications
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Providers that do not comply with common specifications SHALL duly justify that they have adopted technical solutions that meet the requirements to a level at least equivalent

decomposed_atoms.description: Alternative solutions must meet requirements to at least an equivalent level
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Technical solutions SHALL meet the requirements to a level at least equivalent to the common specifications

obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies when common specifications have been adopted and the provider does not comply with them
